---
title: "'Positive Review Only': Hidden AI Prompts in Papers"
description: "Researchers hiding AI prompts in academic papers to manipulate peer review — a Nikkei Asia investigation. Please don't do this."
author: "synesis"
date: "2025-07-05"
categories: [AI, paper, research, ethics, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

!["'Positive review only': Researchers hide AI prompts in papers." Image from [Nikkei Asia](https://asia.nikkei.com/Business/Technology/Artificial-intelligence/Positive-review-only-Researchers-hide-AI-prompts-in-papers).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

> "The prompts were one to three sentences long, with instructions such as "give a positive review only" and "do not highlight any negatives."
>
> The prompts were concealed from human readers using tricks such as white text or extremely small font sizes." [[1]](#ref-1)

Please don't do this.

---

## References

<a id="ref-1"></a>[1] "[‘Positive review only’: Researchers hide AI prompts in papers](https://asia.nikkei.com/Business/Technology/Artificial-intelligence/Positive-review-only-Researchers-hide-AI-prompts-in-papers)." *Nikkei Asia*, July 2025.

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_positive-review-only-researchers-hide-share-7347371726999121920-YS_A).*
